description: Minimalist notes CLI in Python. Serves as a didactic example of Harness Engineering.

features.name: storage_layer
features.title: JSON storage layer
features.description: Atomic read/write of notes to a JSON file. Creates the file if it does not exist.
acceptance: src/storage.py exists with load() and save(notes) functions
save() is atomic (write to temp file + rename)
load() returns [] if the file does not exist
